---
title: "Funding"
---

## Extramural Funding
### National Science Foundation (IUSE; DUE No. 2517117)
**Co-Principal Investigator**
**Project:** *Enhancing Undergraduate Education About Stakeholder Competition and Cooperation in Water Systems Using Game Theory*
**PI:** Cory T. Forbes  
**Award period:** 2025–2028  
**Award amount:** $403,471
This NSF-funded project examines undergraduate learning about water resources management, stakeholder competition and cooperation, multi-criteria decision-making, and game theory. The project includes curriculum development, mixed-methods research, an undergraduate asynchronous course, and professional development workshops.

---

## Fellowships and Honors
### Hispanic Serving Research Universities (HSRU) Postdoctoral Fellowship
**Postdoctoral Fellow (2025–2026)**
Participating in a cohort-based fellowship supporting preparation for faculty careers at research-intensive Hispanic-Serving Institutions.

### University of Texas at Arlington — RISE 100 Postdoctoral Fellowship
**Postdoctoral Fellow (2024–2026)**
University-funded fellowship supporting research development and scholarly growth.

### University of Florida Water Institute Scholarship (2019)
Scholarship supporting participation in climate adaptation science training.

### University of Florida Tropical Conservation and Development Practitioner Grant (2019)
Competitive support for applied sustainability work related to springs conservation.
